footer.tagline: Feel at home wherever you are.
footer.copyright: © {year} Cozy Voyage GmbH. All rights reserved.

about.intro1: Cozy Voyage started as a result of a shared passion: travelling and connecting with people all over the world. Our first experiences hosting guests happened in Berlin, as a means of supporting ourselves in our study times, as well as having the chance to connect with different people from diverse backgrounds.
about.intro2: The idea started gaining traction as we gained experience and first hand feedback from what our guests really liked. The secret recipe was clear: human connection. That is why we decided to do this in a professional way, by extending our first raw and personal contacts into a warm and welcoming service to anyone that stays at our apartments.
about.pillar1Body: When you travel, the little things define the experience. Our designs to make your experience a home away from home. Good Wi-Fi connection in every room. Well equipped kitchen, bathroom, and living room. A cozy, tasteful space that feels like home.
about.pillar2Body: There's no call centre, no third-party property manager. When you reach out, you're talking to us. We know our apartments inside out — because we chose every piece of furniture in them.
about.pillar3Body: We've been guests ourselves hundreds of times. We know what it means to arrive tired after a long journey, or to need a recommendation at 10pm. We try to be the hosts we always wished we'd had.
about.quote: We don't rent out apartments. We share the places we love with people we hope will love them just as much — and that every stay feels unique.
about.ctaSubtext: Berlin or Dresden — we'd love to have you.
